channel.title: Data-Replication on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Data-Replication on Pi Stack

item.title: SymmetricDS vs Debezium vs Canal: Self-Hosted Data Replication & CDC Guide 2026
item.description: When your application grows beyond a single database, keeping data synchronized across systems becomes a critical infrastructure challenge. Whether you need real-time analytics, disaster recovery, or multi-region data distribution, choosing the right self-hosted data replication tool can save your team hundreds of engineering hours.
